calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN MATEO'S motion to change venue is granted. This case is transferred to San Mateo County. The transfer is mandatory per Code of Civil Procedure 394. The County of San Mateo, as the moving party, has the obligation to pay the transfer fees, but since it is exempt from payment of the fees, no fees are required for the transfer. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Joinder In Defendant County Of San Mateos Motion For Venue Transfer
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ANDY MAR'S Joinder In Defendant County Of San Mateo's Motion For Venue Transfer is off calendar in light of the ruling on County of San Mateo's motion for change of venue. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
